European Values Study 2017 Report

Dynamic Report for SURV675 Final Project

Annia Mejia

April 25, 2026

Overview

This report was generated from the EVS Data Explorer Shiny app on April 25, 2026.

Parameter Value
Country / Sample Armenia
Outcome variable Gender attitude (v72)
Additional controls edu_f
Age polynomial degree 3
Regression formula v72 ~ poly(age, 3) + edu_f

This report uses two variables of interest found in this EVS 2017 data set. The first variable (v72) is concerned with the level of agreement with the statement: Men should have more right to a job than women when jobs are scarce.

The second variable (v80) is concerned with the level of agreement with the statement:Employers should give priority to nationals over immigrants when jobs are scarce.

Looking at these two variables of interest provides valuable information about how these attitudes vary age, sex and education to inform policy making across Europe.

Regression Analysis

Model

The model below uses OLS regression. The formula is:

v72 ~ poly(age, 3) + edu_f
